title: Dobo Brothers' Emporium
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Brothers}} {{Company |image=[[File:K2_00081.jpg]] |name=Dobo Brothers' Emporium |founder=[[Dendis Dobo]]
[[Samhan Dobo]] |ledby= |associations= |parent= |subsid= |headquarters= |locations=[[Telos IV]] |role=General store |products= |founding= |dissolved= |affiliation= }} The '''Dobo Brothers' Emporium''' was a store based on [[Telos IV]]'s [[Citadel Station]] after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It was divided in half, and customers could choose to buy items from [[Dendis Dobo|Dendis]], who was an honest merchant, or [[Samhan Dobo|Samhan]], who was a swindler and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. The [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] brothers had a rivalry with each other and often competed for customers. During their stay on the [[Space station/Legends|station]], the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] and her companions may have purchased items from the emporium. ==Behind the scenes== The red sign outside the store above the doorway reads "MERCHANT" in [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' [[Category:Citadel Station locations]] [[Category:Vendors and sellers]]
